title: Calpidia grandifolia
taxonomy: Calpidia grandifolia is classified within the order Lepidoptera, specifically in the family Noctuidae. Noctuidae is a large and diverse family of moths, commonly known as owlet moths or night moths. The genus Calpidia is a part of this family, and it is characterized by its distinctive wing patterns and nocturnal behavior. Calpidia grandifolia is a specific species within this genus, known for its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment. Further classification of Calpidia grandifolia may involve subfamily-level classification within the Noctuidae family.
